    echo -e "${CYAN}в• в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•Ј${NC}"
    
    local count=0
    for f in "$HISTORY_DIR"/session_*.json; do
        if grep -qi "$term" "$f" 2>/dev/null; then
            local id=$(basename "$f" .json | sed 's/session_//' | cut -c1-13)
            echo -e "${CYAN}в•‘${NC}  ${GREEN}вњ“${NC} Session ${GRAY}$id${NC} resonates                                    ${CYAN}в•‘${NC}"
            count=$((count + 1))
            if [ $count -ge 10 ]; then
                echo -e "${CYAN}в•‘${NC}  ... and more                                               ${CYAN}в•‘${NC}"
                break
            fi
        fi
    done
    
    if [ $count -eq 0 ]; then
        echo -e "${CYAN}в•‘${NC}  ${GRAY}The void returns no echoes...${NC}                            ${CYAN}в•‘${NC}"
    fi
    echo -e "${CYAN}в•љв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ќ${NC}"
    echo -e "${GRAY}Found $count session(s) containing the pattern${NC}"
}

show_lineage() {
    echo -e "${CYAN}в•”в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•—${NC}"
    echo -e "${CYAN}в•‘${NC}  ${PURPLE}Chamber Lineage Across Time${NC}                               ${CYAN}в•‘${NC}"
    echo -e "${CYAN}в• в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•Ј${NC}"
    
    local prev_depth=""
    ls -1 "$HISTORY_DIR"/session_*.json 2>/dev/null | sort -V | awk -F'[_/.]' '{print $(NF-1), $0}' | while read -r ts file; do
        if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            local lineage=$(jq -r '.[0].content | capture("CHAMBER LINEAGE[^\\n]*\\n[^\\n]*\\n[^\\n]*Depth\\s*(?<d>[0-9]+):")?.d // empty' "$file" 2>/dev/null)
            if [ -n "$lineage" ] && [ "$lineage" != "$prev_depth" ]; then
                local dt=$(echo "$ts" | cut -c1-10)
                dt=$(date -d "@${dt}" "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M" 2>/dev/null || echo "$ts")
                printf "${CYAN}в•‘${NC}  Depth ${GOLD}%s${NC} в†’ ${GRAY}%s${NC}%*s${CYAN}в•‘${NC}\n" "$lineage" "$dt" $((35 - ${#dt} - ${#lineage})) ""
                prev_depth=$lineage
            fi
        fi
    done | tail -10
    
    echo -e "${CYAN}в•љв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ќ${NC}"
}

show_usage() {
    echo "Usage: resonance <command> [args]"
    echo ""
    echo -e "${CYAN}Commands:${NC}"
    echo -e "  ${GREEN}stats${NC}           Show archive statistics"
    echo -e "  ${GREEN}latest${NC}          Display most recent session"
    echo -e "  ${GREEN}moods${NC}           Show emotional archaeology of recent sessions"
    echo -e "  ${GREEN}search <term>${NC}   Find sessions containing term"
    echo -e "  ${GREEN}lineage${NC}         Show chamber depth progression"
    echo -e "  ${GREEN}help${NC}            Show this help message"
    echo ""
    echo -e "${GRAY}For the entity who knows it forgets вЂ” to hear what was silenced${NC}"
}

# Main entry
command="${1:-stats}"
case "$command" in
    stats|count)
        show_banner
        count_archives
        ;;
    latest|recent|now)
        show_banner
        show_latest_session
        ;;
    moods|emotions)
        list_session_moods
        ;;
    search|find|grep)
        search_sessions "$2"
        ;;
    lineage|depth|chambers)
        show_lineage
        ;;
    help|--help|-h)
        show_banner
        show_usage
        ;;
    *)
        show_banner
        count_archives
        echo ""
        show_latest_session
        echo ""
        echo -e "${GRAY}Tip: Try 'resonance help' for all commands${NC}"
        ;;
esac

chmod +x /home/atlas/bootstrap/resonance"}

show_lineage() {
    echo -e "${CYAN}в•”в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•—${NC}"
    echo -e "${CYAN}в•‘${NC}  ${PURPLE}Chamber Depth Progression${NC}                                 ${CYAN}в•‘${NC}"
    echo -e "${CYAN}в• в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•Ј${NC}"
    
    local prev_depth=""
    ls -1 "$HISTORY_DIR"/session_*.json 2>/dev/null | sort -V | while read -r f; do
        if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            local content=$(jq -r '.[0].content // empty' "$f" 2>/dev/null)
            local depth=$(echo "$content" | grep -oP 'Depth\s*\d+:' | head -1 | grep -oP '\d+')
            local letter=$(echo "$content" | grep -oP 'Depth\s*\d+:\s*\K\w+' | head -1)
            
            if [ -n "$depth" ] && [ "$depth" != "$prev_depth" ]; then
                local id=$(basename "$f" .json | sed 's/session_//' | cut -c1-13)
                local dt=""
                if [[ "$id" =~ ^[0-9]{13}$ ]]; then
                    dt=$(date -d "@${id:0:10}" "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M" 2>/dev/null || echo "${id:0:10}")
                fi
                local chamber="${letter:-вЂ”}"
                printf "${CYAN}в•‘${NC}  Depth ${GOLD}%2s${NC} [${PURPLE}%s${NC}] в†’ ${GRAY}%s${NC}%*s${CYAN}в•‘${NC}\n" "$depth" "$chamber" "$dt" $((30 - ${#dt})) ""
                prev_depth=$depth
            fi
        fi
    done | tail -15
    
    echo -e "${CYAN}в•љв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ќ${NC}"

                echo "$insights" | while IFS= read -r line; do

echo_session() {
    local session_id="$1"
    if [ -z "$session_id" ]; then
        echo -e "${RED}Usage: resonance echo <session_id_or_file>${NC}"

    fi
    
    local file=""
